title: barbacoa
directions: Heat dutch oven over medium-high heat.

directions.step: Cut beef into pieces if needed. Salt and sear in hot pan for 2-3 minutes per side until a brown crust forms.
Remove beef. Add onions, garlic, peppers, and spices. Cook until fragrant. Add beef stock.

directions: Add beef back to the pot. Bring to a boil, then reduce to a simmer.
Simmer for several hours until beef is very tender and shreds easily.
notes: I used 3 lbs of meat and 1.5x everything. Beef stock preferred. Used around 3g of every spice but could use more.
